data.title: Implementation-plan skill does not return control to sprint orchestrator after STATUS:complete
data.description:
## Description

When /dso:sprint invokes /dso:implementation-plan via the Skill tool for each story, the implementation-plan skill emits its STATUS:complete line but control does not return to the sprint orchestrator. Instead, the user must manually prompt the conversation to continue.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. User invokes /dso:sprint, selects epic d111-5a40
2. Sprint orchestrator enters Phase 2 (Implementation Planning Gate)
3. Orchestrator invokes Skill("dso:implementation-plan", args="5d45-de9b") for Layer 0
4. Implementation-plan skill runs through all 6 steps, emits STATUS:complete TASKS:6d45-c859,9189-ce7c,f303-ddae STORY:5d45-de9b
5. **BUG**: Instead of the sprint orchestrator resuming automatically, the conversation stalls. The user had to send a new message for each subsequent /dso:implementation-plan invocation (4105-58f9, 42b6-5803, e2ab-21fb).
6. This happened for ALL 4 implementation-plan invocations — each required a user message to continue.

## Expected Behavior

After the Skill tool returns the STATUS:complete output, the sprint orchestrator should immediately continue to the next layer/story or proceed to Phase 3 (Batch Preparation) without requiring user input.

## Actual Behavior

The Skill tool invocation appears to complete (STATUS:complete is emitted), but the orchestrator does not resume. The conversation waits for user input before continuing.

## Root Cause Hypothesis

The Skill tool invocation within /dso:sprint may be treated as a turn-ending action by the Claude Code runtime, causing the model to yield control back to the user rather than continuing the sprint workflow. The implementation-plan skill's "Termination directive" (STOP IMMEDIATELY after STATUS line) may be interpreted as ending the entire model turn rather than just the skill's output scope.

## Impact

Each implementation-plan invocation requires an extra user interaction, multiplying the manual overhead for epics with many stories. In this sprint, 4 stories required 4 manual nudges just to get through Phase 2.

## Affected Components

- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (orchestrator)
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (skill termination directive)
- Skill tool invocation mechanism
